what_it_does: Records ledger metadata for a JPEG image named p-24 in the design-source/recent-pitches channel and labels it as design ground-truth source material.
observations: Frontmatter uses an addressable URI scheme image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-24
Width and height are both 0 despite mime type image/jpeg
Includes a blob reference, author session id, and creation timestamp
Source field is set to design_source_material
standouts: Explicitly tagged as SOURCE design ground-truth
No outgoing links or content description
concerns: Zero width/height suggests missing image dimension extraction or an incomplete ingest
No links leave the asset isolated from related pitches/projects
No alt text, caption, or visual description is present
notes: A sparse metadata stub for a recent-pitch image asset that has identity and provenance but no dimensions, description, or relationships.
questions: Why are width and height 0 for an image/jpeg entry?
What visual content or pitch does p-24 represent?
Why does this asset have no links to related design artifacts?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated as design ground-truth source material; actual content is a minimal metadata stub with zero dimensions and no descriptive payload.
intention_signals: To register a design-source image as an addressable, provenanced asset that downstream processes can later enrich or relate to other artifacts.
novelty: An image ledger entry that carries no pixel dimensions and no relational links, making it an identity-only record.
contribution: Provides a stable addressable identity, blob reference, author session, timestamp, and channel classification for image p-24; a fused system can retain this as a canonical pointer while adding richer content metadata later.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata record for a JPEG image named p-24 in the design-source/recent-pitches channel, marked as design ground-truth source material with zero width/height and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and make addressable a design-source image asset from recent pitches for retrieval and provenance tracking.
